rationale: X directly surfaces the reviewers' central concern (source_outputs[0] as parent is an unenforced assumption) and, matching Gaohan123's actual ask, recommends adding an assertion/guard — the single most actionable and grounded finding in either review. Y independently investigates the same question but concludes 'no issue, verified correct,' missing the reviewer's actual request for a safety check, and neither candidate mentions the precommit-fix or benchmark-run asks. Y's findings are more rigorously cross-referenced with orchestrator line numbers (higher precision, lower fabrication risk) but are mostly confirmatory rather than actionable, while X pairs a possibly-speculative major finding (NPU/GPU platform claim) with several concrete, well-grounded suggestions.
